requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
requirements.object: immediate effect

conditions:
Provided that for Non-Banking Financial Companies covered under the scope of
these Directions
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that for Non-Banking Financial Companies covered under the scope of
these Directions, as mentioned in paragraph 3, their existing Information Technology
(IT) outsourcing agreements regardless of whether they are due for renewal on or
after the effective date of these Directions shall comply with the provisions of these
Directions either at the time of renewal or by April 10, 2026, whichever is earlier.
requirements.object: of these Directions either at the time of renewal or by April 10, 2026, whichever is earlier

requirements.full_sentence:
However, their new IT outsourcing agreements that come into force on or after the
effective date of these Directions, shall comply with the provisions of these
Directions from the date of agreement itself.
requirements.object: of these Directions from the date of agreement itself

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, nothing in the preceding proviso shall be construed as
permitting non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory
requirements applicable to such arrangements.
requirements.object: non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory requirements applicable to such arrangements

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to following Non-Banking Financial
Companies, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an
NBFC), subject to layer-wise applicability:
Note: The applicability under these Directions is in line with the regulatory
structure for NBFCs as set out in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based
Regulation) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Non-Banking Financial Companies, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an NBFC)

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The provisions prescribed in these directions except Chapter IV and IT-specific
provisions contained in Chapter II (e.g., Board-level IT outsourcing policy and
responsibilities of and reviews by the Board with respect to IT outsourcing) of
these Directions shall apply to NBFCs included in Base layer.
requirements.object: in Base layer

conditions:
where for outsourcing of financial services like applications
<image>
processing (loan origination
requirements.full_sentence:
The scope of provisions contained in Chapter III shall be as under:
(1) The provisions shall apply to material outsourcing arrangements entered into by
an NBFC with a service provider which may be either a member of the group /
conglomerate to which the NBFC belongs, or an unrelated party which is located
in India or elsewhere for outsourcing of financial services like applications
<image>
processing (loan origination, credit card), document processing, marketing and
research, supervision of loans, data processing and back office related activities.
requirements.object: The provisions shall apply to material outsourcing arrangements entered into by an NBFC with a service provider which may be either a

conditions: Provided that for outsourced services relating to credit cards
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that for outsourced services relating to credit cards, the provisions set
out in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit
Cards: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time,
shall also apply to the applicable entities.
requirements.object: applicable entities

requirements.full_sentence: (2) The provisions shall not apply to outsourcing of:

The scope of provisions contained in Chapter IV shall be as under:
(1) The provisions shall apply to an NBFC's material outsourcing of IT services, as
defined in paragraph 58(2) above.
requirements.object: The provisions shall apply to an NBFC's material outsourcing of IT services, as defined in paragraph 58(2) above

requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, 'Outsourcing of IT Services'
shall include outsourcing of the following services:
requirements.object: following services:

(2) The provisions shall not apply to the following services / activities,

conditions: Provided that for the purpose of these Directions
requirements.object: - Commercial Banks

requirements.full_sentence:
and Payment System Operators,
For the purpose of these Directions, 'Commercial Banks' means banking
companies (other than Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks,
Payments Banks and Regional Rural Banks), corresponding new banks,
and the State Bank of India as defined respectively under clauses (c),
(da), and (nc) of section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
requirements.object: Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, Payments Banks and Regional Rural Banks), corresponding new banks, and the State

requirements.full_sentence:
'Continuing basis' shall include agreements for a
limited period.
requirements.object: limited period
the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time, for the

requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the
Information Technology Act, 2000 or the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made
<image>
thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of
Terms published by RBI or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the Information Technology Act, 2000 or the Companies

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC intending to outsource any of its financial or IT activities shall put in
place corresponding comprehensive Board approved outsourcing policy, the
coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 20 and paragraph 62, respectively.
requirements.object: comprehensive Board approved outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 20 and paragraph 62, respe

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board or a Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated, as
applicable for financial or IT outsourcing, shall be responsible for putting in place a
framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective
outsourcing arrangements, laying down appropriate approval authorities
depending on risks and materiality, and undertaking regular review.
requirements.object: in place a framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective outsourcing arrangements, laying

requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of outsourcing of financial services,
(1) the Board, or a Committee of the Board to which powers have been
delegated, shall be responsible, inter alia, for:
requirements.object: for:

requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) reviewing records of all material outsourcing on half yearly basis, in
which case the delegation should be to Risk Management Committee
only.
requirements.object: Committee only

requirements.full_sentence: (2) the Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) of an NBFC shall:

In respect of outsourcing of IT services, the Board shall be responsible, inter alia,
for:
requirements.object: for:

conditions:
when permitting an
exception to the requirement that the service provider of outsourced services
if not a group company
requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) ensuring either by itself or through its Committee that there is no conflict of
interest arising out of third-party engagements, especially when permitting an
exception to the requirement that the service provider of outsourced services,
if not a group company, shall not be owned or controlled by any director, key
managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their
relatives, as indicated under the proviso to paragraph 59 of these Directions;
requirements.object: by any director, key managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their relatives, as indicated under the

requirements.full_sentence:
'Materiality'
of outsourcing shall be based on the:

requirements.object: to perform the service

requirements.full_sentence: Activities that shall not be outsourced

An NBFC which chooses to outsource financial services shall however not
outsource core management functions including Internal Audit, strategic and
compliance functions, and decision-making functions such as determining
compliance with KYC norms for opening deposit accounts, giving sanction for
loans (including retail loans) and management of investment portfolio.
requirements.object: management functions including Internal Audit, strategic and compliance functions, and decision-making functions such as de

conditions: Provided that for an NBFC in a group / conglomerate
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that for an NBFC in a group / conglomerate, these functions may be
outsourced within the group subject to compliance with instructions in paragraph
45 to paragraph 51.
requirements.object: a group / conglomerate, these functions may be outsourced within the group subject to compliance with instructions in paragraph 45 to p

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC, which desires to outsource financial services, shall not require prior
approval from RBI.
requirements.object: RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
As stated in paragraph 9, the outsourcing of any activity by an NBFC shall not
diminish its obligations including to its customers and RBI, and those of its Board
and senior management, who have the ultimate responsibility for the outsourced
activity.
requirements.object: to its customers and RBI, and those of its Board and senior management, who have the ultimate responsibility for th

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall, therefore, be responsible for the actions of its service
provider including Direct Sales Agents (DSAs) / Direct Marketing Agents (DMAs)
and recovery agents and the confidentiality of information pertaining to the
customers that is available with the service provider.
requirements.object: for the actions of its service provider including Direct Sales Agents (DSAs) / Direct Marketing Agents (DMAs) and recovery

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall retain
ultimate control of the outsourced activity.
requirements.object: the outsourced activity

conditions: if not a group company of the NBFC
requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) the service provider, if not a group company of the NBFC, shall not be owned
or controlled by any director of the NBFC, or their relatives having the same
meaning as assigned under Companies Act, 2013 and the Rules framed
thereunder, as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: by any director of the NBFC, or their relatives having the same meaning as assigned under Companies Act, 2013 and the Rules fra

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall be responsible for making Currency Transactions Reports (CTRs)
and Suspicious Transactions Reports (STRs) to FIU or any other competent
authority in respect of its customer related activities carried out by the service
providers.
requirements.object: Currency Transactions Reports (CTRs) and Suspicious Transactions Reports (STRs) to FIU or any other competent authority in r

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC intending to outsource any of its financial services shall put in place a
comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its Board, which shall incorporate,
inter alia, the following:
requirements.object: comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its Board, which shall incorporate, inter alia, the following:

requirements.full_sentence: The Senior Management of an NBFC shall, inter alia, be responsible for:
requirements.object: responsible for:

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall evaluate and guard against the following key risks when entering
into outsourcing arrangement:
requirements.object: the following key risks when entering into outsourcing arrangement:

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) Operational Risk - which may arise due to technology failure, fraud, error,
or inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or
to provide remedies.
requirements.object: failure, fraud, error, or inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or to provide remedies

conditions:
when an NBFC becomes over reliant on one
service provider
requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) Exit Strategy Risk - may arise when an NBFC becomes over reliant on one
service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the
activity back in-house, or enters into contracts that make speedy exits
prohibitively expensive.
requirements.object: becomes over reliant on one service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the activity back in-house

requirements.full_sentence:
(ix) Contractual Risk - where the NBFC may not have the ability to enforce the
contract with the service provider.
requirements.object: enforce the contract with the service provider

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall seek to ensure the confidentiality, security, preservation, and
protection of the customer information in the custody or possession of the service
provider.
requirements.object: confidentiality, security, preservation, and protection of the customer information in the custody or possession of the service pro

requirements.full_sentence:
Access to customer information by a service provider or its staff shall be on a
'need to know' basis, i.e., limited to those areas where the information is required
in order to perform the outsourced function.
requirements.object: to know' basis, i

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall review and monitor the security practices and control processes of
its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclose
security breaches.
requirements.object: security practices and control processes of its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclo

conditions:
where a service provider acts as an outsourcing agent for multiple
entities
requirements.full_sentence:
In instances, where a service provider acts as an outsourcing agent for multiple
entities, the NBFC shall take care to build strong safeguards so that there is no
comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets.
requirements.object: strong safeguards so that there is no comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that a service provider is able to isolate and clearly identify
the NBFC's customer information, documents, records and assets to protect the
confidentiality of the information.
requirements.object: provider is able to isolate and clearly identify the NBFC's customer information, documents, records and assets to protect the c

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall immediately notify RBI in the event of breach of security and
leakage of confidential customer related information.
requirements.object: the event of breach of security and leakage of confidential customer related information

requirements.full_sentence:
In these eventualities, the
NBFC shall be liable to its customers for any damage.
requirements.object: customers for any damage

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an
outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to
comply with obligations in the outsourcing agreement on an ongoing basis.
requirements.object: while considering or renewing an outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply

requirements.full_sentence:
The due diligence mentioned above shall involve an evaluation of all available
information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to:
requirements.object: all available information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to:

requirements.full_sentence:
(viii) external factors like political, economic, social, and legal environment of the
jurisdiction in which the service provider operates and other events that may
impact data security and service performance.
requirements.object: service performance

conditions: Where possible
requirements.full_sentence:
Where possible, an NBFC shall obtain independent reviews and market feedback
on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence.
requirements.object: market feedback on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall also evaluate whether the systems of its service provider are
compatible with those of the NBFC, and the acceptability of their standards of
performance including in the area of customer service.
requirements.object: systems of its service provider are compatible with those of the NBFC, and the acceptability of their standards of performan

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that the terms and conditions governing the outsourcing
arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the NBFC's
legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability.
requirements.object: and conditions governing the outsourcing arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the NBFC's legal

requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement shall
appropriately reckon the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or
managing them.
requirements.object: risks and the strategies for mitigating or managing them

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently
flexible to allow it to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing and
the right to intervene with appropriate measures to meet legal and regulatory
obligations.
requirements.object: agreement is sufficiently flexible to allow it to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing and the right to int

requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement shall also bring out the nature of legal relationship
between the parties, i.e., whether agent-principal or otherwise.
requirements.object: nature of legal relationship between the parties, i

requirements.full_sentence: Some of the key provisions of the agreement shall include:

(xi) provision that confidentiality of customers' information shall be maintained
even after the contract expires or gets terminated;
requirements.object: the contract expires or gets terminated

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall have in place a management structure to monitor and control its
outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with its service
provider contain provisions to address the same.
requirements.object: management structure to monitor and control its outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with its service pr

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall maintain a central record of all material outsourcing of financial
services for review by its Board and Senior Management.
requirements.object: of all material outsourcing of financial services for review by its Board and Senior Management

requirements.full_sentence:
The records shall be
<image>
updated promptly, and half yearly reviews shall be placed before the Board or Risk
Management Committee.
requirements.object: and half yearly reviews shall be placed before the Board or Risk Management Committee

requirements.full_sentence:
Regular audits, by either the internal auditors or external auditors of an NBFC shall
assess the adequacy of the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and
managing the outsourcing arrangement, the NBFC's compliance with its risk
management framework, and the requirements of these Directions.
requirements.object: the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and managing the outsourcing arrangement, the NBFC's compliance with its ri

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall, at least on an annual basis, review the financial and operational
condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its
outsourcing obligations.
requirements.object: an annual basis, review the financial and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its ou

requirements.full_sentence:
Such due diligence reviews, which shall be based on all
available information about the service provider, shall highlight any deterioration or
breach in performance standards, confidentiality, and security, and in operational
resilience or business continuity preparedness.
requirements.object: available information about the service provider, shall highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards, confidentialit

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the NBFC shall ensure that reconciliation of
transactions between itself and the service provider (or its subcontractors) is
carried out in a timely manner.
requirements.object: transactions between itself and the service provider (or its subcontractors) is carried out in a timely manner

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall require its service provider to develop and establish a robust
framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and
recovery procedures.
requirements.object: to develop and establish a robust framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and recovery pr

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall ensure that the service provider periodically
tests the Business Continuity and Recovery Plan and may also consider
occasional joint testing and recovery exercises with its service provider.
requirements.object: provider periodically tests the Business Continuity and Recovery Plan and may also consider occasional joint testing and recov

requirements.full_sentence:
In establishing a viable contingency plan, an NBFC shall consider the availability of
alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity
back in-house in an emergency, and the costs, time, and resources that would be
involved.
requirements.object: alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity back in-house in an emergency, and t

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the NBFC's
information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse
<image>
conditions or termination of the agreement, all documents, records of transactions
and information given to the service provider, and assets of the NBFC, can be
removed from the possession of the service provider (in order to continue its
business operations);
requirements.object: providers are able to isolate the NBFC's information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse <image> cond

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to mitigate the risk of unexpected termination of the outsourcing
agreement or insolvency or liquidation of its service provider, an NBFC shall retain
an appropriate level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the
right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its business operations
without incurring prohibitive expenses and disruption in the operations of the
NBFC and its services to the customers.
requirements.object: of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its bu

requirements.full_sentence:
In the event of termination of an outsourcing agreement for any reason, this shall
be publicised by the NBFC by displaying at a prominent place in the branch,
posting it on the website, and informing the customers so as to ensure that the
customers do not continue to deal with the service provider.
requirements.object: NBFC by displaying at a prominent place in the branch, posting it on the website, and informing the customers so as to ensure tha

requirements.full_sentence:
In a group structure, an NBFC may have back-office and service arrangements or
agreements with group entities such as sharing of premises, legal and other
professional services, hardware and software applications and centralized back-
office functions;
requirements.object: arrangements or agreements with group entities such as sharing of premises, legal and other professional services, hardwa

requirements.full_sentence:
Before entering into such arrangements with group entities, an NBFC shall have a
policy approved by the Board or a Committee of the Board and also Service Level
Agreements (SLAs) with its group entities, which shall also cover demarcation of
sharing resources, e.g., premises, and personnel.
requirements.object: by the Board or a Committee of the Board and also Service Level Agreements (SLAs) with its group entities, which shall also cov

requirements.full_sentence:
In such arrangements, an NBFC shall inform the customers specifically about the
company which is actually offering the product / service, wherever there are
multiple group entities involved, or any cross selling observed.
requirements.object: about the company which is actually offering the product / service

requirements.full_sentence:
While entering into such arrangements, an NBFC shall ensure that these:
<image>

An NBFC shall ensure that its ability to carry out its operations in a sound fashion
would not be affected, if premises or other services (such as IT systems and
support staff) provided by the group entities become unavailable.
requirements.object: to carry out its operations in a sound fashion would not be affected

conditions:
If the premises of an NBFC are shared with the group entities for the purpose of
cross-selling
requirements.full_sentence:
If the premises of an NBFC are shared with the group entities for the purpose of
cross-selling, the NBFC shall take measures to ensure that the entity's
identification is distinctly visible and clear to the customers.
requirements.object: that the entity's identification is distinctly visible and clear to the customers

requirements.full_sentence:
The marketing
brochure used by the group entity and verbal communication by its staff / agent in
the NBFC's premises shall mention nature of arrangement of the entity with the
NBFC so that the customers are clear on the seller of the product.
requirements.object: of the entity with the NBFC so that the customers are clear on the seller of the product

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall not publish any advertisement or enter into any agreement stating
or suggesting or giving tacit impression that it is in any way responsible for the
obligations of its group entities.
requirements.object: enter into any agreement stating or suggesting or giving tacit impression that it is in any way responsible for the oblig

requirements.full_sentence:
The risk management practices to be adopted by an NBFC while outsourcing to a
related party (i.e., party within the group / conglomerate) shall be identical to those
for a non-related party.
requirements.object: for a non-related party

requirements.full_sentence:
In principle, outsourcing arrangements shall only be entered into with parties
operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality agreements and clauses.
requirements.object: with parties operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality agreements and clauses

requirements.full_sentence: While engaging with service provider(s) in a foreign country, an NBFC shall:

Outsourcing arrangements entered into by an NBFC shall not affect the rights of its
customers against the NBFC, including the ability of the customers to obtain
redressal as applicable under relevant laws.
requirements.object: its customers against the NBFC, including the ability of the customers to obtain redressal as applicable under relevant laws

conditions:
where customers are required to deal with a service provider in the
process of dealing with an NBFC
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where customers are required to deal with a service provider in the
process of dealing with an NBFC, the NBFC shall incorporate a clause in the
corresponding product literature and brochures, stating that services of the service
provider, including in sales, and marketing of the products, may be used.
requirements.object: the corresponding product literature and brochures, stating that services of the service provider, including in sales, and mar

requirements.full_sentence:
The role
of the service provider may be indicated in broad terms.
requirements.object: terms

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall have a robust grievance redressal mechanism that shall not be
compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i.e., responsibility for
redressal of customers' grievances related to outsourced services shall rest with
the NBFC.
requirements.object: manner on account of outsourcing, i

conditions: In case of microfinance loans
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of microfinance loans, a declaration that, (i) the NBFC shall be
accountable for inappropriate behaviour of the employees of the service provider
and (ii) shall provide timely grievance redressal, shall be made in the loan
agreement, and Fair Practices Code (FPC) displayed in its office, branch premises
and its website.
requirements.object: behaviour of the employees of the service provider and (ii) shall provide timely grievance redressal, shall be made i

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the above,
(1) an NBFC shall constitute Grievance Redressal Machinery in accordance with
the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025;
requirements.object: in accordance with the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Responsible Bus

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) at the operational level, an NBFC shall display the name and contact details
(Telephone / Mobile Nos.
requirements.object: contact details (Telephone / Mobile Nos

requirements.full_sentence:
The
designated officer shall ensure that genuine grievances of customers are
redressed promptly without involving delay.
requirements.object: of customers are redressed promptly without involving delay
NBFC's Grievance Redressal Machinery will also deal with the issue relating to services provided by the outsourced agency

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(3) an NBFC shall give a time limit of 30 days to the customers for preferring their
complaints or grievances.
requirements.object: of 30 days to the customers for preferring their complaints or grievances
NBFC's website

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(4) if a complaint is rejected wholly or partly by an NBFC and the complainant is
not satisfied with the reply or does not get any reply within 30 days, after the
NBFC received the complaint, the complainant shall have the following options
for redressal of their grievance(s):
requirements.object: for redressal of their grievance(s):

requirements.full_sentence:
In this Chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'IT services' means IT services / IT enabled services / IT activities.
requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'IT services' means IT services / IT enabled services / IT activities

conditions:
if disrupted or compromised shall have the potential to significantly
impact the NBFC's business operations
requirements.full_sentence:
(i) if disrupted or compromised shall have the potential to significantly
impact the NBFC's business operations;
requirements.object: significantly impact the NBFC's business operations

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) may have material impact on the NBFC's customers in the event of
any unauthorised access, loss, or theft of customer information;
requirements.object: the NBFC's customers in the event of any unauthorised access, loss, or theft of customer information

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Service Provider' means provider of IT services including entities related to
the NBFC, or those which belong to the same group or conglomerate to which
the NBFC belongs.
requirements.object: including entities related to the NBFC, or those which belong to the same group or conglomerate to which the NBFC belongs

conditions: Provided that for the purpose of this Chapter
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that for the purpose of this Chapter, the following indicative (but not
exhaustive) list of vendors and entities shall not be considered as 'Service
Providers' as defined above:
requirements.object: Providers' as defined above:

conditions: if not a group company
requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to adhering to the requirements stipulated in subparagraphs (i) to (v) of
paragraph 18 of these Directions, an NBFC shall ensure that the service provider,
if not a group company, shall not be owned or controlled by any director, or key
managerial personnel, or approver of the outsourcing arrangement of the NBFC,
or their relatives.
requirements.object: by any director, or key managerial personnel, or approver of the outsourcing arrangement of the NBFC, or their relatives

requirements.full_sentence:
The terms 'control', 'director', 'key managerial personnel', and
'relative' shall have the same meaning as assigned under the Companies Act,
2013 and the Rules framed thereunder from time to time.
requirements.object: as assigned under the Companies Act, 2013 and the Rules framed thereunder from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that an exception to the above requirement may be made with the
approval of Board or a Committee of the Board, followed by appropriate
disclosure, oversight and monitoring of such arrangements.
requirements.object: above requirement may be made with the approval of Board or a Committee of the Board, followed by appropriate disclosure, oversigh

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall evaluate the need for outsourcing of IT services based on a
comprehensive assessment of attendant benefits, risks, and availability of
commensurate processes to manage those risks.
requirements.object: outsourcing of IT services based on a comprehensive assessment of attendant benefits, risks, and availability of commensurate pr

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the NBFC
shall, inter alia, consider the following:
requirements.object: the following:

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that cyber incidents are reported to it by the service
provider without undue delay, so that an incident is reported by the NBFC to the
RBI within six hours of detection by the service provider.
requirements.object: are reported to it by the service provider without undue delay, so that an incident is reported by the NBFC to the RBI wit

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC intending to outsource any of its IT services shall put in place a
comprehensive Board approved IT outsourcing policy incorporating, inter alia, the
following:
requirements.object: comprehensive Board approved IT outsourcing policy incorporating, inter alia, the following:
(1) assisting the Senior Management in identifying, measuring, monitoring, mitigating and managing the level of IT outsourcing

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall put in place a risk management framework that comprehensively
deals with the processes and responsibilities for identification, measurement,
mitigation, management, and reporting of risks associated with such IT
outsourcing arrangements.
requirements.object: risk management framework that comprehensively deals with the processes and responsibilities for identification, measurement, mitigatio

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall suitably document risk assessments with necessary approvals in
line with the roles and responsibilities of the Board of Directors, Senior
Management, and IT Function and subject the same to internal and external
quality assurance on a periodic basis as determined by the Board-approved policy.
requirements.object: with necessary approvals in line with the roles and responsibilities of the Board of Directors, Senior Management,

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall effectively assess the impact of concentration risk posed by
multiple outsourcing arrangements to the same service provider and the
concentration risk posed by outsourcing critical or material functions to a limited
number of service providers.
requirements.object: of concentration risk posed by multiple outsourcing arrangements to the same service provider and the concentration risk

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall be responsible for the confidentiality and integrity of data and
information pertaining to its customers that are available to the service provider.
requirements.object: confidentiality and integrity of data and information pertaining to its customers that are available to the service provider

requirements.full_sentence:
In this regard, an NBFC shall adhere to directions stated in paragraph 23 to
paragraph 26 of these Directions and additionally ensure that:
<image>
requirements.object: in paragraph 23 to paragraph 26 of these Directions and additionally ensure that: <image>
know' basis, with appropriate controls to prevent security breaches or data misuse

requirements.full_sentence:
In these eventualities, the NBFC
shall adhere to the extant instructions issued by RBI from time to time on
Incident Response and Recovery Management.
requirements.object: instructions issued by RBI from time to time on Incident Response and Recovery Management

conditions:
if there is clear separation and isolation
of data (NBFC
requirements.full_sentence:
With regard to requirement that the data should not be combined or comingled, as
stipulated in paragraph 26, it would suffice if there is clear separation and isolation
of data (NBFC, and its customer specific data and information) to ensure that only
the personnel as authorised by the NBFC is able to access data that belongs to
them in a multi-tenant environment / architecture.
requirements.object: as stipulated in paragraph 26, it would suffice if there is clear separation and isolation of data (NBFC, and its customer s

requirements.full_sentence:
The directions regarding service provider evaluation as applicable to outsourcing
of financial services contained in paragraph 29 to paragraph 31 shall apply,
mutatis mutandis, to outsourcing of IT services, with the following additional
considerations:
requirements.object: outsourcing of IT services, with the following additional considerations:

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC should adopt a risk-based approach in conducting such due diligence
activities.
requirements.object: in conducting such due diligence activities

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that its rights and obligations and those of each service
provider are clearly defined and set out in a legally binding written agreement, in
line with the provisions specified in paragraph 33 of these Directions.
requirements.object: and obligations and those of each service provider are clearly defined and set out in a legally binding written agreement, in l

requirements.full_sentence:
In principle,
the provisions of the agreement shall appropriately reckon the criticality of the
outsourced task to the business of the NBFC, the associated risks and the
strategies for mitigating or managing them.
requirements.object: of the outsourced task to the business of the NBFC, the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or man

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the requirements specified in subparagraphs (i) to (vii) of paragraph
34, an NBFC shall also include at minimum (as applicable to the scope of
Directions in this Chapter) the following aspects in any agreement for outsourcing
of IT services:
requirements.object: (as applicable to the scope of Directions in this Chapter) the following aspects in any agreement for outsourcing of IT servic

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall have in place a management structure to monitor and control its
outsourced services.
requirements.object: management structure to monitor and control its outsourced services

requirements.full_sentence:
This shall include (as applicable to the scope of Directions in
this Chapter), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the
systems and resources, service availability, adherence to SLA requirements, and
incident response mechanism.
requirements.object: the scope of Directions in this Chapter), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the systems and resou

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall conduct regular audits (as applicable to the scope of Directions in
this Chapter), of service providers (including sub-contractors) with regard to the
<image>
service outsourced by it.
requirements.object: applicable to the scope of Directions in this Chapter), of service providers (including sub-contractors) with regard to the

requirements.full_sentence:
Such audits may be conducted either by NBFC's internal
or external auditors appointed to act on NBFC's behalf.
requirements.object: NBFC's internal or external auditors appointed to act on NBFC's behalf

requirements.full_sentence:
While outsourcing various IT services, more than one RE may be availing services
from the same third-party service provider.
requirements.object: the same third-party service provider

requirements.full_sentence:
In such scenarios, in lieu of conducting
separate audits by individual REs of the common service provider, they may adopt
pooled (shared) audit.

However, in doing so, it shall be the responsibility of REs in
ensuring that the audit requirements related to their respective contract with the
service provider are met effectively.
requirements.object: REs in ensuring that the audit requirements related to their respective contract with the service provider are met effectivel

requirements.full_sentence:
The audits shall assess, inter alia, the performance of the service provider,
adequacy of the risk management practices adopted by the service provider, and
compliance with laws and regulations.
requirements.object: performance of the service provider, adequacy of the risk management practices adopted by the service provider, and compliance

requirements.full_sentence:
The frequency of the audit shall be
determined based on the nature and extent of risk and impact on the NBFC from
the outsourcing arrangements.
requirements.object: the nature and extent of risk and impact on the NBFC from the outsourcing arrangements

conditions:
in case of any
adverse development
requirements.full_sentence:
Reports on the monitoring and control activities
shall be reviewed periodically by the Senior Management, and in case of any
adverse development, the same shall be put up to the Board for information.
requirements.object: the Senior Management, and in case of any adverse development, the same shall be put up to the Board for information

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC, depending upon the risk assessment, may also rely upon globally
recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu
of conducting independent audits.
requirements.object: recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu of conducting independent audits

requirements.full_sentence:
However, this shall not absolve the NBFC of its
responsibility in ensuring assurance on the controls and procedures required to
safeguard data security (including availability of systems) at the service provider's
end.
requirements.object: its responsibility in ensuring assurance on the controls and procedures required to safeguard data security (including availabilit

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall periodically review the financial and operational condition of the
service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its obligations.
requirements.object: and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its obligations

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC
shall adopt risk-based approach in defining the periodicity.
requirements.object: defining the periodicity

requirements.full_sentence:
Such due diligence
reviews shall highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards,
confidentiality security, and operational resilience preparedness.
requirements.object: breach in performance standards, confidentiality security, and operational resilience preparedness

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that the service provider grants unrestricted and effective
access to (a) data related to the outsourced services;
requirements.object: provider grants unrestricted and effective access to (a) data related to the outsourced services

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall create an inventory of IT services outsourced to service providers
(including key entities involved in their supply chains).
requirements.object: IT services outsourced to service providers (including key entities involved in their supply chains)

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the NBFC shall
map its dependency on third parties and periodically evaluate the information
received from the service providers.
requirements.object: third parties and periodically evaluate the information received from the service providers

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions regarding 'Business Continuity and Management of Disaster
Recovery Plan' as applicable to outsourcing of financial services contained in
paragraph 40 to paragraph 43 shall apply, mutatis mutandis, to outsourcing of IT
services.
requirements.object: outsourcing of IT services

requirements.full_sentence:
The Business Continuity Plan (BCP) and Disaster Recovery Plan (DRP)
for outsourced IT services shall be commensurate with the nature and scope of the
outsourced service as per extant instructions issued by RBI from time to time on
BCP / DR requirements.
requirements.object: nature and scope of the outsourced service as per extant instructions issued by RBI from time to time on BCP / DR requirement

requirements.full_sentence:
The IT outsourcing policy shall contain a clear exit strategy for ensuring business
continuity during and after exit.
requirements.object: strategy for ensuring business continuity during and after exit

requirements.full_sentence:
The strategy shall include plans for different scenarios of exit or termination of
services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary.
requirements.object: scenarios of exit or termination of services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary

requirements.full_sentence:
In documenting its exit strategy, an NBFC shall, inter alia, identify alternative
arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service
provider, or by the NBFC itself.
requirements.object: alternative arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service provider, or by the NBFC itself

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on
safe removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical),
as applicable.
requirements.object: have necessary clauses on safe removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical), as

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the outsourcing agreement shall ensure that the service
provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any
<image>
data during the transition period, unless specifically advised by the regulator or the
concerned NBFC.
requirements.object: provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any <image> data during the transition period

requirements.full_sentence:
A service provider shall be legally obliged to cooperate fully with both the NBFC
and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition.
requirements.object: cooperate fully with both the NBFC and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition

conditions: where the service provider deals with the customers of the NBFC
requirements.full_sentence:
In the event of termination of the outsourcing agreement for any reason in cases
where the service provider deals with the customers of the NBFC, the same shall
be given due publicity by the NBFC so as to ensure that the customers stop
dealing with the concerned service provider.
requirements.object: by the NBFC so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing with the concerned service provider

conditions: provided that such an arrangement is backed by the Board-approved policy
requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC may outsource any IT service within its business group / conglomerate,
provided that such an arrangement is backed by the Board-approved policy, and
appropriate SLAs / agreements with its group entities are in place.
requirements.object: backed by the Board-approved policy, and appropriate SLAs / agreements with its group entities are in place

requirements.full_sentence:
The selection of a group entity shall be based on objective reasons that are similar
to selection of a third-party, and the NBFC shall appropriately deal with any
conflicts of interest that such an outsourcing arrangement may entail.
requirements.object: reasons that are similar to selection of a third-party, and the NBFC shall appropriately deal with any conflicts of interest tha

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC, at all times, shall maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with
its group entities.
requirements.object: relationship in dealings with its group entities

requirements.full_sentence:
Risk management practices being adopted by the NBFC while
outsourcing to a group entity shall be identical to those specified for a non-related
party.
requirements.object: specified for a non-related party

requirements.full_sentence:
In principle, outsourcing arrangements shall only be entered into with parties
operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality clauses and agreements.
requirements.object: with parties operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality clauses and agreements

requirements.full_sentence:
Considering the risks associated with outsourcing of Security Operations Centre
(SOC) operations by an NBFC, such as data being stored and processed at an
external location and managed by the service provider (or its subcontractors) to
which the NBFC has lesser visibility, the NBFC, to mitigate the risks, shall adopt
the following requirements in the case of outsourcing of SOC operations in
addition to the controls prescribed in this Chapter:
definition, customisation and related data / logs, meta-data and analytics
(specific to the NBFC);
requirements.object: in the case of outsourcing of SOC operations in addition to the controls prescribed in this Chapter: definition, cust

requirements.full_sentence:
Considering the varied services, benefits, and risk profiles associated with the
cloud deployment and service models, an NBFC that uses cloud services for
storage, computing and movement of data in cloud environments shall, in addition
to other applicable provisions in these Directions:
requirements.object: other applicable provisions in these Directions:

requirements.full_sentence:
Such
assessment shall include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads
of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration,
consulting, migration, and projected recurring expenditure depending on the
<image>
nature of workloads.
requirements.object: limited to, an analysis of various heads of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration, consulting, m

requirements.full_sentence:
The extent of cloud adoption may vary, ranging from
migration of non-business critical workloads to the cloud, to deployment of
critical business applications such as SaaS, or other combinations in
between, and shall be determined based on a duly conducted business
technology risk assessment;
requirements.object: a duly conducted business technology risk assessment
procedures are consistent with business needs and legal and regulatory requirements

requirements.full_sentence:
For cloud security best practices, an NBFC may refer to, inter alia, NIST SP
800-210 General Access Control Guidance for Cloud Systems
https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/SpecialPublications/NIST.SP.800-210.pdf.
requirements.object: NIST SP 800-210 General Access Control Guidance for Cloud Systems https://nvlpubs

requirements.full_sentence:
Such a policy shall, inter
alia,

An NBFC shall enter into a contract only with CSPs
that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements and
the rights available thereunder to the NBFC, including those relating to
aspects such as data storage, data protection, and confidentiality;
requirements.object: only with CSPs that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements and the rights available thereunder to

requirements.full_sentence: The technology architecture shall:

requirements.object: of the service level stipulations in SLA

requirements.full_sentence:
The
Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those Directions
requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being
in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
